Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.

    Ensures that the value is within a range.

    Ensures that the value is within a range.

    Ensures that the value is equal to expected.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isEqualTo(int expected, String name)
    Ensures that the value is equal to expected.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isGreaterThan(int minimumExclusive)
    Ensures that the value is greater than a lower bound.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isGreaterThan(int minimumExclusive, String name)
    Ensures that the value is greater than a lower bound.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(int minimumInclusive)
    Ensures that the value is greater than or equal to a minimum value.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(int minimumInclusive, String name)
    Ensures that the value is greater than or equal a minimum value.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isLessThan(int maximumExclusive)
    Ensures that the value is less than an upper bound.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isLessThan(int maximumExclusive, String name)
    Ensures that the value is less than an upper bound.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isLessThanOrEqualTo(int maximumInclusive)
    Ensures that the value is less than or equal to a maximum value.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isLessThanOrEqualTo(int maximumInclusive, String name)
    Ensures that the value is less than or equal to a maximum value.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator

    Ensures that the value is a multiple of factor.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator

    Ensures that the value is a multiple of factor.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator.isNotEqualTo(int unwanted)
    Ensures that the value is not equal to unwanted.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator

    Ensures that the value is not equal to unwanted.
